panels.description: Wide shot: A bustling 1890s London harbor filled with towering cargo ships. Crates of grain and meat are being hoisted onto docks. In the foreground, the silhouette of a man looks on, his posture slumped and defeated, suggesting a mental fog. Dramatic sunlight pierces through the harbor mist.

bubbles.text: Across the world, shipping was going Londonward for relief... but I drifted—a demented man.

panels.description: Medium shot: Inside a cozy Victorian parlor in St. John's Wood. The protagonist, looking haggard with unkempt hair, is being tended to by a kindly older couple. He is shouting at the ceiling with a manic grin. Warm, soft lighting from a fireplace.

bubbles.text: THE LAST MAN LEFT ALIVE! HURRAH!
They sheltered me and protected me from myself.

panels.description: Close up: The protagonist's face frozen in absolute shock and horror. Behind him, a faint, terrifying spectral image of a Martian tripod towering over the burning ruins of Leatherhead. Harsh, high-contrast shadows to emphasize the intensity of the revelation.

bubbles.text: Leatherhead had been destroyed... every soul in it, by a Martian. Swept out of existence like an ant hill.

panels.description: Medium close shot: The man sits alone in a dim room four days later. He is looking out a window with a hollow expression. The reflection of his sad, lonely face is visible in the glass. The atmosphere is heavy with melancholy.

bubbles.text: I was a lonely man, and a sad one. I felt a growing craving to look once more on the life I had lost.

panels.description: Medium shot: The protagonist stands at the doorway of the house, suitcase in hand. He is tearfully shaking the hand of his benefactor. The street outside is visible—bright and strangely empty under a mockingly clear sky.

bubbles.text: I could resist no longer. Parting from these four-day friends with tears, I went out again into the dark streets.

panels.description: Wide angle shot: A London street scene. People with yellowed skin and shaggy hair, dressed in dirty rags, are wandering about. Some look exultant, others grim. A public drinking fountain is running in the foreground. The city looks like a gathering of tramps.

bubbles.text: London seemed a city of tramps. Faces were either filled with leaping exultation or grim resolution.

panels.description: Medium shot: A street corner where a haggard special constable with a white badge stands guard. In the background, a wagon distributes French bread to a crowd. Large, strange metallic Martian mechanisms are being examined by men in the distance. The mood is one of strange, desperate recovery.

bubbles.text: Haggard constables stood at every corner. Already, the examination of Martian mechanisms yielded results.
